answer: The night air hangs heavy with the scent of jasmine, creating a dreamy backdrop for tales spun under a sky brimming with stars. In this timeless realm, whispers of magic linger, drawing one into a world where ancient lore and folklore intertwine, reminiscent of the mythical shores where mermaids dance beneath the moon.
